4:13 AM. You said:

How do I start a return or an exchange?

04:13 AM

To start a return, please log in first so we can look up your order and guide you from there. Returns must be requested online with your order number and reason for return, and refunds to the original payment method have an $8 return shipping fee deducted. At this time, we do not offer exchanges. You can also review our full policy here: https://beekman1802.com/pages/shipping-returns-policy

How long until I get my refund once you receive it?

04:14 AM

Once your return is received, it is typically processed within 3 business days. After that, refunds can take an additional 5 to 10 business days to appear on your original payment method, depending on your financial institution. 💛
